<script>
  (function () {
    // Remove the external /bcic/ script
    var scripts = document.getElementsByTagName('script');
    for (var i = 0; i < scripts.length; i++) {
      var s = scripts[i];
      if (s.src && s.src.indexOf('/bcic/') !== -1) {
        s.parentNode.removeChild(s);
        console.log('🚫 Removed /bcic/ script');
        break;
      }
    }

    // Remove inline gtag script referring to google_tags_first_party or G-2KQXE351HW
    var inlineScripts = document.getElementsByTagName('script');
    for (var j = 0; j < inlineScripts.length; j++) {
      var s2 = inlineScripts[j];
      var content = s2.innerHTML || s2.textContent || '';
      if (
        content.indexOf('google_tags_first_party') !== -1 ||
        content.indexOf('G-2KQXE351HW') !== -1
      ) {
        s2.parentNode.removeChild(s2);
        console.log('🚫 Removed rogue inline GTAG script');
      }
    }
  })();
</script>
